description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Stable Compilation that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run a Docker job on multiple Linux distributions, including Debian 10, Ubuntu 20.04, Debian 11, and Ubuntu 22.04. For each distribution, the workflow installs dependencies, clones the repository (optionally at a custom Git reference), compiles the code using CMake and Ninja, installs the build, and runs tests.
